subject: [PATCH pynfs 05/13] server41tests: test OFFLOAD_CANCEL on async copy

2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch adds a new test case to the server41tests suite, which tests the OFFLOAD_CANCEL operation on an asynchronous copy. The test starts an async copy and immediately issues an OFFLOAD_CANCEL request, verifying that the server responds correctly even if the copy completes before the cancel arrives.
